briefdescription.para: Augment an input tensor with logical padding.

detaileddescription.para: When an input tensor is imported using a tiler the resulting tensors may have elements beyond the space of the original tensor. In terms of the origin tensor the subtensor may for example start at offset(-1, -1, -1) in this case the elements at (-1, -1, -1), (-1, 0, 0) etc. needed to be created from a process of augmentation.
Currently the only dynamic part of the augmentation is the size of the augmentation the augmented values are simply hardcode.
A TTL_augmented_dim is the number of elements to augment. A number of a "augmented" elements in the unit of elements
